title: Core Manager Tests

tasks.description: Create TransactionManager tests - Test transaction lifecycle (begin, commit, rollback, nested), batch operations (create, update, delete, atomicity), conflict resolution (concurrent modifications, optimistic locking, retry), and error handling (partial failure, data integrity, logging)
testCategories: Transaction Lifecycle (begin, commit, rollback, nested transactions)
Batch Operations (create, update, delete entities, atomicity)
Conflict Resolution (concurrent modifications, optimistic locking, retry)
Error Handling (rollback on partial failure, data integrity, logging)

tasks.description: Expand EntityManager hierarchy tests - Test setEntityParent (set parent, detect cycles, throw CycleDetectedError, update lastModified), getChildren, getAncestors, getDescendants, and moveEntity operations
testCategories: setEntityParent (set parent, detect cycles, CycleDetectedError, update lastModified)
getChildren (direct children, empty for leaf nodes)
moveEntity (new parent, prevent moving to descendant)

tasks.description: Expand GraphStorage tests - Test index operations (NameIndex, TypeIndex, LowercaseCache build and update), append operations (entity append, pending tracking, compaction), and cache management (invalidation, concurrent access, persistence)
testCategories: Index Operations (NameIndex build, TypeIndex build, LowercaseCache, index updates)
Append Operations (append without rewrite, pending tracking, compact after threshold)
Cache Management (invalidation on external change, concurrent access, persistence)

tasks.description: Create KnowledgeGraphManager facade tests - Test manager delegation (EntityManager, RelationManager, SearchManager, lazy-load), cross-manager operations (entity/relation coordination, consistency), and compression operations (find duplicates, merge entities, compress graph)
testCategories: Compression Operations (find duplicates, merge entities, compress graph)

successCriteria: Core module coverage increases from 45% to 95%
notes: Core managers are the backbone of data integrity. TransactionManager has 0% coverage despite being critical for atomic operations. EntityManager hierarchy methods (merged from HierarchyManager in Phase 1) need comprehensive testing.
